macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Algorand Leads Crypto Gainers with 5-8% Surge, Followed by DeXe and Cosmos
items.summary: Algorand ($ALGO) topped gainers with a 5.38-8% increase to $0.1138 in the past 24 hours, followed by DeXe ($DEXE) up 5-7.48% to $13.53 and Cosmos ($ATOM) up 4-5%. High trading volumes support the altcoin rally amid broader market fluctuations.

items.title: Bitcoin Dips Below $78K Amid Minor Market Decline and High Liquidations
items.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) slipped under $78,000 to around $77,500-$77,590, down 0.5-0.9% in 24 hours, with total network liquidations reaching $84.7 million, longs at $55.3 million. BTC market share holds above 58% despite volatility.

items.title: Ethereum NFT Trading Volume Surges 72% to $3.93M, BAYC Up 266%
items.summary: Ethereum NFT trading volume jumped 72.78% to $3.93 million in 24 hours, with Bored Ape Yacht Club (BAYC) volume soaring 266% to $1.45 million. Gold Apes NFT set sold for $282K, signaling persistent market interest.

items.title: Bitcoin Whales Accumulate $3.17B Since April, ETFs See $2.12B Inflows
items.summary: Bitcoin whales accumulated $3.17 billion since April 10 amid market uncertainty, with ETFs recording nine-day inflows of $2.12 billion. Analysts eye $80K as next target despite recent dips.

items.title: XRP Sees Major Outflows: 35M Tokens Leave Exchanges as Whales Accumulate
items.summary: Nearly 35 million XRP tokens withdrawn from exchanges in 24 hours, the sixth-largest outflow of 2026, with potential for 30% rally to $1.87-$1.89. Monthly RSI flip signals upcoming activity.

items.title: Aave Launches Community Rescue Fund After $57.75M Bad Debt from rsETH Incident
items.summary: Aave absorbed $57.75 million in bad debt from the rsETH incident and launched a community rescue fund. Stablecoin transaction volume hit $4.5 trillion in Q1 2026.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Meta and Microsoft Announce Major Layoffs Amid Heavy AI Investments
items.summary: Meta is cutting about 10% of its staff (nearly 8,000 workers) to offset massive AI investments exceeding $115 billion this year, while Microsoft offers early retirement to 7% of its US workforce as both companies bet big on AI amid a tech layoff wave.

items.title: New Paper Warns Generative AI Heightens Cyberattack and Data Leak Risks in ML Systems
items.summary: A Heriot-Watt University computer scientist's paper in Cell Press Patterns argues that integrating generative AI into machine-learning pipelines increases bias, opacity, security vulnerabilities, and audit challenges across code writing, data labeling, and decision-making.

items.title: Intel Shares Surge 20% on AI Agent Growth and Strategic Partnerships
items.summary: Intel's stock rose 20% following strong results driven by AI agent expansion, new partnerships, and momentum in data centers and AI PCs.

items.title: Ex-AWS Leader: Enterprises Must Prioritize People Over Tech for AI Success
items.summary: Matt Domo, co-founder of AWS's database service, states enterprise AI projects fail when focusing on technology instead of people, predicting an 86% rise in AI IT budgets this year with demands for real ROI through business signals and predictive decisions.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Outriders 2 Development Suspension Lifted, Becomes Real Possibility
items.summary: People Can Fly's recent business report indicates Outriders 2 (Project Gemini) is now viable after Square Enix previously refused publishing, overturning earlier suspension rumors.

items.title: League of Legends Controller Support Discovered, Console Version Hinted
items.summary: A discovery shows League of Legends automatically hooks to controllers when Wild Drift is enabled, fueling speculation about an official console port by Riot.

items.title: Clash of Clans April Update Sneak Peek: New Troops, Defenses, and Leagues
items.summary: Upcoming update features new troop and defense levels, Sky Wagon Siege Machine, Logger Guardian, Electro Fangs, plus Titan/ Legend Leagues in CWL and ranked improvements.

items.title: Sony Shocks with PS5 Pro Wins Amid Leaks; Nintendo Sued
items.summary: Weekly roundup covers PS5 Pro reviews, Nintendo lawsuit, Xbox/Game Pass fixes under Asha Sharma, Minds Eye scandal, and Rockstar creator payment issues.

items.title: World of Warcraft Patch 12.0.5 Launches as Buggiest in History
items.summary: Patch plagued by broken bonus rolls, disabled strafing, and AFK issues in Decor Duel, with hotfixes issued but problems persisting.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Oracle Closes $16B Financing for Massive Michigan Data Center
items.summary: Oracle has secured $16 billion in financing, including $14 billion in bonds from BofA, for a giant data center campus in Michigan. The facility is planned to power applications for OpenAI.

items.title: Samsung Mobile Division Faces First Annual Loss Due to RAM and Storage Shortages
items.summary: Samsung co-CEO TM Roh warned leaders that the MX mobile division could report its first-ever annual loss this year amid shortages of RAM and storage components. Skyrocketing costs are impacting smartphone production.

items.title: Citizen Lab Uncovers Two Spying Campaigns Exploiting Telecom Protocols Across 2G to 5G
items.summary: Security researchers at Citizen Lab detailed two campaigns abusing SS7 and Diameter protocol weaknesses in 2G, 3G, 4G, and 5G networks to track locations globally.

items.title: RBI Cancels Paytm Payments Bank Licence
items.summary: India's central bank, RBI, has cancelled the licence of Paytm Payments Bank due to regulatory issues.

items.title: US, UK, and Australia Sanction Russian Cyber Firms for Ransomware Support
items.summary: The US, UK, and Australia imposed coordinated sanctions on Russia-based Media Land and related entities for providing bulletproof hosting that enables ransomware and phishing attacks.

items.title: X Launches Dedicated Messaging App XChat for iOS
items.summary: X (formerly Twitter) has introduced XChat, a standalone messaging app for iOS users.

items.title: Instagram Quietly Launches Standalone App Instants
items.summary: Instagram has rolled out Instants, a new standalone app focused on specific features.

items.title: Tesla Begins Robotaxi Production with Cybercab Ramp-Up Expected by Year-End
items.summary: Tesla has started production of its robotaxi, with plans to accelerate Cybercab output by the end of the year.

items.title: Tin Can's $100 Retro Wi-Fi Landline Phone Gains Traction in Schools to Curb Smartphone Use
items.summary: The viral Tin Can retro-style Wi-Fi-enabled landline phone is being distributed by schools to students to reduce smartphone dependency.
